name: Clubwoman's Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt.
3. In three separate wells in the center of the sifter, add 2 tablespoons vinegar, 3/4 cup oil, and 2 teaspoons vanilla extract.
4. Pour 2 cups water over the dry ingredients.
5. Stir gently with a fork until all ingredients are just combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9 inch pan.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Frost as desired or dust with powdered sugar.
